administering an initial dose of 160-320 mg of degarelix to the subject, wherein the initial dose is administered as two subcutaneous injections; and
administering a maintenance dose of 60-160 mg of degarelix to the subject once every 20-36 days thereafter, wherein the maintenance dose results in a testosterone suppression below 0.5 ng/mL;
thereby treating prostate cancer in the subject with a reduced likelihood of causing a testosterone spike or other GnRH agonist side effect.
